title: Towb #2899
definition:
Tob-adonijah = "my Lord is good"

 1) one of the Levites sent by Jehoshaphat through the cities of Judah
    to teach the law to the people
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tob-adonijah = "my Lord is good"

 1) one of the Levites sent by Jehoshaphat through the cities of Judah
    to teach the law to the people

    NASB:  good is my LORD, a Levite
